reasoning: On March 6, with BTC around $69,800, Polymarket bettors gave a 28% chance of BTC dipping to $60,000 before the end of March. Since then, the price has generally trended upward or remained stable, reaching up to $73,600 on March 13 and trading around $71,000 on March 14-15. Searches confirm there has been no flash crash or sudden dip in March up to the current date. Over a 16-day horizon, reaching 60,000 would require an approx. 15-18% drop. While possible given the severe recent volatility (BTC plummeted to $60,000 in February from >$100k levels), the reduced time frame and higher current baseline price make it substantially less likely now than on March 6. I estimate the probability at 12%.
